entry.title: New: RES25-182 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO REQUEST ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR CONTRACT NO. SC-COR-2300079 FOR THE SERVICES OF MCCORRISTON MILLER MUKAI MACKINNON LLP, AS SPECIAL COUNSEL FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU REPRESENTING DEFENDANT MAX JOHN SWORD IN A MATTER ENTITLED UNITED STATES V. DONNA YUK LAN LEONG, ET AL., CRIMINAL NO. CR21-00142 LEK (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
